subject: bye-bye
body:
Hello Jeffrey,how are you?
i am leaving today,wanted to say goodbye to you,huge thank you for everything!! 
you are my knight.. :) 
i wish you all of your problems to be resolved,really wish you and hope that everything will be fine. take care and be well.
i will write you.
millions kisses
goodbye,
Nina
